final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial landscape photo, wide format
Primary request: ancient primeval forest at dawn with Tyndall light beams piercing through dense canopy onto moss-covered rocks, mountain stream in midground, layered depth from ferns to redwood trunks to misty peaks
Scene/backdrop: deep old-growth forest interior at early morning; thin mist drifting between trees; distant mountain silhouette faintly visible through haze; winding crystal-clear mountain stream reflecting surrounding green foliage
Subject: foreground — lush fern clusters and wild mushrooms on forest floor; midground — towering redwood trunks rising out of frame; background — soft hazy mountain ridge
Style/medium: photorealistic nature photography, wide-angle lens, visible depth of field
Composition/framing: wide-angle shot, 16–24mm lens, strong foreground-to-background layering, prominent bokeh on distant elements
Lighting/mood: first light of dawn, dramatic Tyndall god rays breaking through dense canopy, dappled golden light on moss-covered ancient rocks, mysterious and serene atmosphere
Color palette: deep forest green, vivid emerald green, warm golden yellow; rich tonal gradation between shadow and light
Materials/textures: velvety moss on weathered stone, wet fern fronds, rough redwood bark, soft mist diffusion, mirror-like water surface reflections
Avoid: artificial HDR halos, oversaturated neon green, plastic foliage, lens flare overload, watermark
